---
title: "ORF Finder"
output: null_document
---

# Setup
```{r}
library(pannagram)
library(ggplot2)

```

# Files
```{r}

file.seqs = 'seqs_orf_finder.fasta'

```

# Read
```{r}

seq = readFasta(file.seqs)

```

# Finder
```{r}
orf.info = orfFinder(seq)

head(orf.info$pos)
head(orf.info$orf)
```

# Visualisation
```{r}
p.orf = orfplot(orf.info$pos)

p.dot = dotplot(seq, seq)

p.orf
p.dot

```


# Save
```{r}


writeFasta(seq, sub('fasta', 'txt', file.seqs))

savePNG(p.orf, path = '../images/', name = 'orf_orfplot', width = 7, height = 4)
savePNG(p.dot, path = '../images/', name = 'orf_dotplot', width = 4, height = 4)

```
